message:
🌱 apisix: Proposal: support OpenPolicyAgent for access control (#1584)

* 🌱 Add apisix: Proposal: support OpenPolicyAgent for access control mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 fix: clean up mission content for apisix OPA plugin

Replace raw schema table in step 3 and codeSnippets with actual
APISIX OPA plugin configuration example. Clean up resolution summary.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "apisix-5714-proposal-support-openpolicyagent-for-access-control",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "apisix: Proposal: support OpenPolicyAgent for access control",
+    "description": "Proposal: support OpenPolicyAgent for access control. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current apisix deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your apisix version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n apisix -l app.kubernetes.io/name=apisix\nhelm list -n apisix 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working apisix installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review apisix configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant apisix configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n apisix -l app.kubernetes.io/name=apisix\nkubectl get configmap -n apisix -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=apisix\n```\nOPA is an open source lightweight general-purpose policy engine, which is a full-featured policy engine that can replace the built-in policy module in your software and decouple the service from the policy engine."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Proposal: support OpenPolicyAgent for access control",
+        "description": "The OPA plugin was implemented in PR apache/apisix#5734. To use it, configure the `opa` plugin on your APISIX route with the policy URI and request/response body handling options.\n```yaml\n# Example: Enable OPA plugin on an APISIX route\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:9180/apisix/admin/routes/1 \\\n  -H 'X-API-KEY: your-api-key' -X PUT -d '\n{\n  \"uri\": \"/get\",\n  \"plugins\": {\n    \"opa\": {\n      \"host\": \"http://opa-service:8181\",\n      \"policy\": \"example/allow\",\n      \"with_route\": true,\n      \"with_consumer\": true\n    }\n  },\n  \"upstream\": {\n    \"type\": \"roundrobin\",\n    \"nodes\": {\n      \"httpbin.org:80\": 1\n    }\n  }\n}'\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n apisix -l app.kubernetes.io/name=apisix\nkubectl get events -n apisix --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Proposal: support OpenPolicyAgent for access control\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The OPA plugin for access control was added to Apache APISIX via PR #5734. Configure it on routes using the `opa` plugin with `conf.host` pointing to your OPA server and `conf.policy` specifying the policy path.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Enable OPA plugin on an APISIX route\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:9180/apisix/admin/routes/1 \\\n  -H 'X-API-KEY: your-api-key' -X PUT -d '\n{\n  \"uri\": \"/get\",\n  \"plugins\": {\n    \"opa\": {\n      \"host\": \"http://opa-service:8181\",\n      \"policy\": \"example/allow\",\n      \"with_route\": true,\n      \"with_consumer\": true\n    }\n  },\n  \"upstream\": {\n    \"type\": \"roundrobin\",\n    \"nodes\": {\n      \"httpbin.org:80\": 1\n    }\n  }\n}' "
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "apisix",
+      "community",
+      "api-gateway",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "apisix"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/apache/apisix/issues/5714",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/apache/apisix",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/apache/apisix/pull/5734"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 19,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with apisix installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-20T06:49:51.100Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
